prompt: Medium-wide shot, eye-level camera, gentle static framing with a very slight push-in. A pristine white dog sits calmly beside a premium dog food bowl and matching packaging in a warm, sunlit luxury home interior. The dog remains still and attentive while the scene breathes with quiet, elegant realism; soft window light, creamy beige and walnut tones, refined linen and ceramic textures, polished commercial finish. Ambient: soft room tone, faint natural hush, subtle fabric movement, no dialogue.

Medium shot with a gentle locked-off feel and a controlled slow push-in as the white dog lowers its head and begins eating from the bowl. Across the duration of the shot, the coat transforms smoothly and seamlessly from white to black, spreading in a controlled premium reveal with no harsh effects or abrupt cuts. Keep the same warm, sunlit interior and elegant product placement throughout; the motion should feel graceful, believable, and refined. SFX: soft kibble crunches, bowl contact, subtle breathing. Ambient: quiet upscale interior room tone, no dialogue.

Hero shot, slightly wider than medium, with a slow elegant push-in toward the now-black dog sitting calmly in the same warm luxury interior beside the premium food and packaging. The dog holds a composed, content pose while the final frame settles into a polished product-reveal finish; rich black coat contrast, soft window light, creamy beige and walnut palette, refined textures, aspirational commercial tone. Ambient: quiet room tone and a faint soft musical hush, no dialogue.
